goal: Answer the customer with the smallest useful context.

constraints: Never expose internal policy names to customers.

context.ticket: Customer says order ORD-123 was charged twice and asks for a duplicate-charge refund.
context.policy: Refund policy section A. Refund policy section B. Refund policy section C. Refunds require order id, amount, payment event, and eligibility check before a customer-facing promise is made. Internal appendix: collect evidence, avoid unsupported promises, summarize action taken, route exceptions, check payment event, confirm customer id, review prior refund history, inspect risk notes, avoid exposing internal labels.
